discover_interface_list.description: Interface-list to run discovery on, e.g. "all", "LAN", "none".

mode.description: Whether the router transmits and/or receives discovery frames.

lldp_med_net_policy_vlan.description: LLDP-MED network-policy VLAN, e.g. "auto" or a VLAN id.

lldp_mac_phy_config.description: Include the IEEE 802.3 MAC/PHY Configuration/Status TLV in LLDP frames.

lldp_max_frame_size.description: Include the Maximum Frame Size TLV in LLDP frames.

lldp_vlan_info.description: Include the Port VLAN ID and VLAN Name TLVs in LLDP frames.
